title: Half-Heart Minecraft
description: A Datapack that will make Minecraft Half-Hearted!
body:
This Datapack will make Minecraft much harder.
As the name stated, Minecraft will now only be Half-Hearted. You can still eat golden apples and get absorption hearts, but they are temporary like usual.

Fall from 4 blocks? Dead.

Your friend punches you? Dead.

Drown for one second? Dead.

Get hit by a rogue arrow? Dead.

Has Multiplayer capabilities.
You may use this in your servers or videos.


NOTE: WHILE USING DIFFICULTIES, ALL PLAYERS **MUST** BE ONLINE WHILE SETTING. You may also set difficulties multiple times. To reset, run reset function. ALL PLAYERS MUST BE ONLINE FOR RESETTING DIFFICULTIES.
